title: EmiBridge
description: A framework mod that bridges JEI recipes to EMI, designed for NeoForge 1.21.1.
body: EmiBridge automatically translates recipes registered in JEI (Just Enough Items) into a format recognizable by EMI (Emi Mod Integration), enabling full recipe compatibility and display within EMI. It also provides an **Adapter API** for other mods to implement custom recipe translation logic.
